buildCommand: if [ ! -d "flutter" ]; then git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable; fi && ./flutter/bin/flutter config --enable-web && ./flutter/bin/flutter build web --release ${SERVER_HTTP:+--dart-define=SERVER_HTTP="$SERVER_HTTP"} ${AUTH0_DOMAIN:+--dart-define=AUTH0_DOMAIN="$AUTH0_DOMAIN"} ${AUTH0_CLIENT_ID:+--dart-define=AUTH0_CLIENT_ID="$AUTH0_CLIENT_ID"} ${AUTH0_AUDIENCE:+--dart-define=AUTH0_AUDIENCE="$AUTH0_AUDIENCE"} ${PUBLIC_WEB_APP_BASE_URL:+--dart-define=PUBLIC_WEB_APP_BASE_URL="$PUBLIC_WEB_APP_BASE_URL"} ${BANNER_AD_UNIT_ID_WEB:+--dart-define=BANNER_AD_UNIT_ID_WEB="$BANNER_AD_UNIT_ID_WEB"} ${INTERSTITIAL_AD_UNIT_ID_WEB:+--dart-define=INTERSTITIAL_AD_UNIT_ID_WEB="$INTERSTITIAL_AD_UNIT_ID_WEB"} ${NATIVE_AD_UNIT_ID_WEB:+--dart-define=NATIVE_AD_UNIT_ID_WEB="$NATIVE_AD_UNIT_ID_WEB"}
